coupon_deals.title: 15% Off Dryer Repair
coupon_deals.description: Save 15% on any standard dryer repair when your pre-discount service subtotal is $80 or more.
coupon_deals.terms: Valid for standard dryer repair services only. Minimum pre-tax, pre-fee subtotal of $80 required. Cannot be combined with other offers or maintenance plans. One use per household.

coupon_deals.title: 10% Off Any Standard Repair
coupon_deals.description: Get 10% off labor on any standard in-home appliance repair over $100.
coupon_deals.terms: Applies to standard repair visits only. Does not apply to diagnostic fees, emergency surcharges, or parts. One coupon per job.

coupon_deals.title: $20 Off Annual Maintenance
coupon_deals.description: Take $20 off any scheduled annual maintenance visit when booking online.
coupon_deals.terms: Valid for maintenance appointments only. Minimum maintenance package value of $120. May be combined with multi-appliance discounts.

coupon_deals.title: 5% Off Refrigerator Protection Plans
coupon_deals.description: Save 5% every month on eligible refrigerator service plans for the first year.
coupon_deals.terms: Applies to new refrigerator service plan signups only. Discount applies to monthly plan fee for first 12 months.

coupon_deals.title: $50 Emergency Service Credit
coupon_deals.description: Get a $50 credit toward parts when you book a same-day emergency repair.
coupon_deals.terms: Valid on emergency service mode only. Credit applies to parts subtotal on the same invoice.

coupon_deals.title: 15% Off New Home Dishwasher Install & Repair
coupon_deals.description: New move-in special: 15% off dishwasher repair or install within 60 days of closing.
coupon_deals.terms: Proof of recent home purchase may be required. Install labor only; does not discount new appliance purchase.

coupon_deals.title: 10% Off Multi-Appliance Maintenance Bundle
coupon_deals.description: Schedule maintenance for two or more appliances in a single visit and get 10% off labor.
coupon_deals.terms: Requires at least two appliances on a single maintenance appointment. Not valid on repairs.

coupon_deals.title: 20% Off Washer Repair (Expired)
coupon_deals.terms: Expired offer shown for reference only.

help_articles.title: Oven Diagnostic Fees by ZIP Code
help_articles.body:
## Oven Diagnostic Fees by ZIP

The table below lists our standard **oven diagnostic fees** for common service areas. These fees apply to standard weekday appointments and include travel and up to 30 minutes of troubleshooting.

| ZIP Code | City/Area           | Standard Oven Diagnostic Fee |
|----------|---------------------|------------------------------|
| 60601    | Chicago Downtown    | **$89**                      |
| 30301    | Atlanta Core        | **$85**                      |
| 10001    | New York (Chelsea)  | **$89**                      |

> Note: The oven diagnostic fee in **60601 is $89**. Emergency or same-day bookings may add an additional surcharge.

### What the fee includes
- Travel to your home
- Visual inspection of the oven or range
- Basic electrical and gas safety checks (where applicable)
- A written or emailed repair estimate

### When fees can differ
Fees may vary for:
- Holidays and after-hours service
- Remote or out-of-area ZIP codes
- Commercial or restaurant equipment

For the most accurate pricing, start a booking and confirm your ZIP code on the pricing step.

help_articles.title: How to Book an Appliance Repair Online
help_articles.body:
## Booking an Appliance Repair Online

1. Navigate to the **Home** page and click **"Book Repair"** in the top navigation.
2. Choose your **appliance type** (e.g., dishwasher, dryer, refrigerator).
3. Enter your **ZIP code** to see local pricing and availability.
4. Use filters for **time of day** (morning, afternoon, evening) and sort by **diagnostic fee** if desired.
5. Select a **time slot** and complete the booking form with your contact details.
6. Review your appointment and click **"Confirm Booking"**.

You can manage or reschedule your appointment any time from the **"My Appointments"** page using your phone number and booking reference.

help_articles.title: Same-Day Emergency Service and Surcharges
help_articles.body:
## Same-Day Emergency Service

For urgent issues, you can book **same-day emergency repair** from the **Emergency Service** page.

### Typical Same-Day Emergency Surcharges
The emergency surcharge is added to our standard diagnostic fee:

- **Refrigerator**: higher surcharge due to potential food loss and complexity
- **Washing machine**: lowest surcharge among the listed emergency options
- **Oven / Range**: mid-range surcharge

Exact surcharge amounts are shown in the emergency booking flow once you select an appliance and date.

help_articles.title: How Technician Ratings and Reviews Work
help_articles.body:
## Technician Ratings

Each technician is rated on a 5-star scale based on customer feedback. You can:

- Browse technicians from the **Technicians** page
- Filter by **ZIP code** and **availability today**
- Sort by **Rating: High to Low** to see the highest-rated technicians first

Your preferred technicians are saved in your **My Account > Preferred Technicians** section.

help_articles.title: Service Plans and Warranty Coverage Overview
help_articles.body:
## Service Plans Overview

We offer ongoing protection plans for key appliances, including **refrigerators**, **washers**, **dryers**, and bundled kitchen packages.

Plans differ by:
- **Monthly price**
- **Warranty duration** (in months, typically 12–36)
- Number of **included visits per year**

On the **Pricing & Plans** page, you can filter plans by appliance type (e.g., refrigerator) and compare warranty terms.

help_articles.title: Multi-Appliance Maintenance Discounts
help_articles.body:
## Multi-Appliance Maintenance

You can schedule **washer and dryer maintenance in a single visit** and receive a bundle discount. When you:

1. Start from **Schedule Maintenance** in the top navigation.
2. Add a **washing machine** and then use **"Add Another Appliance"** to add a **dryer**.
3. Choose an **afternoon** time window (e.g., 2:00–5:00 PM) at least 7 days from today.

A **multi-appliance discount** option will appear on the pricing step and automatically reduce your combined labor charge.

help_articles.title: Supported Refrigerator Brands and Models
help_articles.body:
## Supported Refrigerator Models

We support most major brands including Samsung, LG, Whirlpool, GE, KitchenAid, and more.

### Example Supported Samsung Models
- **RF28R7201SR** – French door with dual ice maker
- RF263TEAESG

You can use the **model compatibility check** on the **Refrigerators** service page to confirm support for your exact model.

help_articles.title: Using Your Account Profile and Service Notes
help_articles.body:
## My Account and Notes

In **My Account**, you can:

- Update your contact information and default ZIP code
- View preferred technicians
- Store personal **service notes** for future reference

### Adding a Note
1. Go to **My Account > Notes**.
2. Click **"Add Note"**.
3. Enter any helpful details, such as:
   - "Oven diagnostic fee in 60601 is $89" (from the pricing article)
   - Preferred appointment times or building access instructions
4. Click **"Save Note"** to store it in your profile.

service_plans.name: Refrigerator Economy Care - 12 Months
service_plans.description: Entry-level protection for a single refrigerator with essential coverage and 1-year warranty on covered repairs.
service_plans.coverage_details: Covers labor for mechanical and electrical failures after the diagnostic fee. Includes one preventative check per year.
service_plans.exclusions: Does not cover cosmetic damage, doors, shelves, or commercial use.

service_plans.name: Refrigerator Basic Care - 12 Months
service_plans.description: Standard protection for a single refrigerator with 12-month warranty on covered repairs.
service_plans.coverage_details: Includes coverage for compressor, evaporator fan, control boards, and thermostats. Priority scheduling for plan members.
service_plans.exclusions: Ice maker cosmetic parts and door gaskets not covered under this tier.

service_plans.name: Refrigerator Plus Protection - 24 Months
service_plans.description: Extended 2-year warranty coverage for a single refrigerator with enhanced benefits.
service_plans.coverage_details: Covers most functional failures, includes up to two no-charge diagnostic visits per year and food loss reimbursement up to $200.
service_plans.exclusions: Intentional damage, flood/fire damage, and built-in commercial units excluded.

service_plans.name: Kitchen Bundle Protection - 3 Appliances
service_plans.description: Covers one refrigerator, one dishwasher, and one oven or range under a single plan.
service_plans.coverage_details: Bundle pricing with shared visit allowances across covered kitchen appliances.
service_plans.exclusions: Built-in coffee machines and specialty appliances are not included.

service_plans.name: Laundry Pair Protection - 12 Months
service_plans.description: Protects one washing machine and one dryer with a shared visit allowance.
service_plans.coverage_details: Ideal for washer and dryer combos. Includes lint and hose safety checks.
service_plans.exclusions: Stack kit hardware and vent rerouting not included.

service_plans.name: Whole Home Appliance Protection - 36 Months
service_plans.description: Comprehensive 3-year plan covering up to 8 major household appliances.
service_plans.coverage_details: Best value for full-home coverage, with priority scheduling and extended parts warranty.
service_plans.exclusions: Commercial-grade and specialty appliances not included.

service_plans.name: Oven & Range Basic Protection - 12 Months
service_plans.description: Protects a single oven or range with 1-year warranty on covered repairs.
service_plans.coverage_details: Covers common control, ignition, and heating element failures.
service_plans.exclusions: Cosmetic components, grates, and glass doors not covered.

service_plans.name: Legacy Refrigerator Plan (Inactive)
service_plans.description: Older refrigerator plan kept for legacy customers; no longer sold.
service_plans.coverage_details: Legacy terms only; new customers should select a current plan.
